Interface IServerObjectManager4

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.Server
Assembly
ESRI.Server.Server.dll

Provides access to properties and members of the ArcGIS server's server object manager.

[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
[Guid("B87E5523-E612-4D71-A37F-89BE65D783FD")]
public interface IServerObjectManager4 : IServerObjectManager3, IServerObjectManager2, IServerObjectManager
